results.title: Anees Bazmee gets nostalgic as Salman Khan-starrer ‘Ready’ clocks 15 years
results.description: Mumbai, May 28 (IANS) Filmmaker Anees Bazmee turned nostalgic on Wednesday evening, as his Salman Khan-starrer comedy entertainer ‘Ready’ completed 15 years since its release. [...]
